info.title: Contact Extractor API
info.description: Contact Extractor API. Extract public emails, phone numbers, social profile links, and address-like contact signals from a website. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Extract public emails, phone numbers, social profile links, and address-like contact signals from a website.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS website URL to analyze.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
